name: Orange and Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually combine dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt) with buttermilk, alternating additions to ensure a light batter.
4. Stir in chopped dates, pecans or walnuts, and grated orange rind until evenly distributed.
5. Divide the batter between two greased and floured 8 1/2 inch pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for about an hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing them from the oven.
8. Spoon remaining glaze mixture over the warm loaves.
9. Can be made ahead of time and frozen for later use.
